scope: manual competitive rewrite candidates from react importance-3 batch 01

reasons: the page still reads more like a hook inventory than a clear hook-selection decision matrix
follow-up trade-offs such as useState vs useReducer and useRef vs state are underdeveloped
differentiation is weaker than stronger interview-first hook guides
items.recommendedAction: if revisited later, replace part of the hook inventory with a decision table and one component-level example that shows why different hooks solve different jobs
